validation.description: Invalid input — fix the argument and retry

network.description: Transient network error — safe to retry

CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED.recovery: Add --yes flag to confirm, or --dry-run to simulate without executing

NOT_IMPLEMENTED.recovery: This feature is not yet available. Check for updates.

INVALID_PUBKEY.recovery: Provide a valid Solana public key (base58 encoded)

INVALID_BYTES.recovery: Provide a valid byte array (JSON format, 64 bytes)

IMPORT_FAILED.recovery: Check the key format. Supported: base58, byte array, Solana CLI JSON file

INVALID_KEY.recovery: The private key is malformed. Check the format and try again

INVALID_FILE.recovery: File could not be read or parsed. Check the path and format

INVALID_SLIPPAGE.recovery: Slippage must be a positive number in basis points

INVALID_SUBACCOUNT.recovery: Subaccount index 0 is reserved for cross-margin. Use 1+ for isolated

UNKNOWN_MARKET.recovery: Run 'vulcan market list' to see available markets

UNKNOWN_TOOL.recovery: Run MCP tools/list to see available tools

MISSING_ARG.recovery: Provide the required argument. Check tool schema for required fields

PASSWORD_MISMATCH.recovery: Passwords do not match. Try again

INVALID_CHOICE.recovery: Enter a valid menu option number

WALLET_EXISTS.recovery: A wallet with this name already exists. Choose a different name or remove the existing one

WALLET_NOT_FOUND.recovery: Run 'vulcan wallet list' to see available wallets, or create one with 'vulcan wallet create'

DECRYPT_FAILED.recovery: Wrong password. Check VULCAN_WALLET_PASSWORD env var or try again

KEYPAIR_ERROR.recovery: Wallet keypair is corrupted. Try re-importing the wallet

NO_DEFAULT_WALLET.recovery: Run 'vulcan wallet set-default <NAME>' to set a default wallet

CONFIG_LOAD_FAILED.recovery: Config file is invalid. Run 'vulcan setup' to recreate it

CONFIG_SAVE_FAILED.recovery: Cannot write to ~/.vulcan/. Check directory permissions

MCP_INIT_FAILED.recovery: MCP server failed to initialize. Check config and try again

REGISTER_API_FAILED.recovery: Check your invite code and API URL. Run 'vulcan status' to verify connectivity

TRADERS_FETCH_FAILED.recovery: Phoenix API unreachable. Run 'vulcan status' to check connectivity

EXCHANGE_FETCH_FAILED.recovery: Cannot reach Phoenix API. Check api_url in config and network connectivity

MARKETS_FETCH_FAILED.recovery: Cannot fetch market list. Run 'vulcan status' to check API connectivity

MARKET_FETCH_FAILED.recovery: Market not found or API error. Run 'vulcan market list' to see available markets

CANDLES_FETCH_FAILED.recovery: Cannot fetch candle data. Check symbol and interval parameters

BUILD_ORDER_FAILED.recovery: Failed to build order transaction. Check market info and lot sizes

BUILD_CANCEL_FAILED.recovery: Failed to build cancel transaction. Verify order IDs exist

BUILD_REGISTER_FAILED.recovery: Failed to build registration transaction. Account may already be registered

BUILD_DEPOSIT_FAILED.recovery: Failed to build deposit transaction. Check USDC balance with 'vulcan wallet balance'

BUILD_WITHDRAW_FAILED.recovery: Failed to build withdrawal. Check available collateral with 'vulcan margin status'

BUILD_CLOSE_FAILED.recovery: Failed to build close transaction. Check position exists with 'vulcan position list'

BUILD_REDUCE_FAILED.recovery: Failed to build reduce transaction. Check position size

BUILD_TPSL_FAILED.recovery: Failed to build TP/SL. TP/SL can only be set when opening or extending a position

BUILD_BRACKET_FAILED.recovery: Failed to build bracket orders. Check TP/SL prices relative to entry

BUILD_TRANSFER_FAILED.recovery: Failed to build transfer. Check subaccount indices and collateral balance

BUILD_SWEEP_FAILED.recovery: Failed to build sweep transaction. Check child subaccount exists

BUILD_SYNC_FAILED.recovery: Failed to build sync transaction. Check child subaccount exists

WS_CONNECT_FAILED.recovery: WebSocket connection failed. Check network and try again

WS_SUBSCRIBE_FAILED.recovery: WebSocket subscription failed. Check symbol and try again

NO_MARKET_DATA.recovery: No market data received. Market may be inactive — try again

NO_ORDERBOOK_DATA.recovery: No orderbook data received. Try again

NO_MID_DATA.recovery: No mid price data received. Try again

TIMEOUT.recovery: Request timed out. Check network connectivity and try again

BLOCKHASH_FAILED.recovery: Cannot get recent blockhash from RPC. Check rpc_url in config

RPC_BALANCE_FAILED.recovery: Cannot fetch balance from RPC. Check rpc_url in config

TX_SEND_FAILED.recovery: Transaction rejected on-chain. Check wallet SOL balance, account state, and error logs

PASSWORD_READ_FAILED.recovery: Cannot read password. Set VULCAN_WALLET_PASSWORD env var for non-interactive use

WALLET_LIST_FAILED.recovery: Cannot list wallets. Check ~/.vulcan/wallets/ directory permissions

WALLET_SAVE_FAILED.recovery: Cannot save wallet file. Check ~/.vulcan/wallets/ directory permissions

KEYGEN_FAILED.recovery: Key generation failed unexpectedly. Try again

SESSION_WALLET_ERROR.recovery: Session wallet state is invalid. Restart the MCP server

MCP_SERVE_FAILED.recovery: MCP server failed to start. Check stderr for details

MCP_WAIT_FAILED.recovery: MCP server exited unexpectedly. Check stderr for details

ISOLATED_ONLY_MARKET.recovery: This market only supports isolated margin. Re-run with --isolated --collateral <AMOUNT>

NO_POSITION.recovery: No open position for this market. Check 'vulcan position list'

NO_TP_SL.recovery: Specify at least one of --tp or --sl

NO_ISOLATED_POSITION.recovery: No isolated position for this market. Open one first

INVALID_ORDER_IDS.recovery: Check order IDs with 'vulcan trade orders'

LIST_FAILED.recovery: Check ~/.vulcan/wallets/ directory exists and is readable
